top_signals.title: Smaller firms in Japan raise pay by 4.29% in fiscal 2026
top_signals.summary: Wage growth expanded from 4.03% a year before, reflecting employers' continued efforts to secure human resources amid rising inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: NYNJ FIFA Chief on How Fans Can Get to MetLife Stadium for the Games
top_signals.summary: Alex Lasry, Chief Executive Officer of the NYNJ Host Committee for the FIFA World Cup 2026, says the region is ready for the tournament and contingency plans are in place for any transportation issues that arise.  (Source: Bloomberg)
